name: diagGetActiveVariant
title: diagGetActiveVariant
syntax: long diagGetActiveVariant(char ecuQualifier[], char outputBuffer[], dword bufferSize);

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: If given, returns the active variant of this target. If omitted, the target formerly set by diagSetTarget is used.

return:
Length of qualifier written to buffer, may be truncated.
Error code
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
